title: rubus oblongulus
intro: Rubus oblongulus is a type of thorny shrub native to South Africa, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's leaves and roots are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and improving digestion. Rubus oblongulus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
